title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates
company: Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates:
Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates!
